title: Pollen (CEO Negus-Fancey, CTO Wright) tried to remove article, and Google helped
summary: Pollen CEO和CTO试图删除一篇关于他们的批评文章，并获得了谷歌的协助。
translated_summary: Pollen CEO Negus-Fancey and CTO Wright attempted to remove a critical article about them, with Google reportedly assisting in the takedown process.
